achivements

Some selected achievements that I like to show off.

2020    Our work in Expert Systems journal is listed among the top 10% most read papers.

2020    I appear on newspapers for my AWSAR Award:1, 2, 3.

2020    I won the AWSAR Award 2019 from DST, Govt. of India (Read my submission)

2018    Won the Best Student Research Paper Award from Machine Learning Journal in ILP.

2018    Awarded Travel Grant from EurAI to attend ACAI-2018, Ferrara, Italy.

2016    Selected for Summer Research Fellowship from NIST Berhampur

2015    Selected for IASc-INSA-NASI Summer Research Fellowship to work at ISI Kolkata

2012/15    Qualified Graduate Aptitute Test in Engineering (GATE)

2014    Qualified UGC National Eligibility Test (UGC-NET)

2014    University Silver Medal for Best Post Graduate in Computer Science and Engineering

2012-14    GATE Scholarship from MHRD, India

2013    Institute Silver Medal for Best Graduate in Information Technology
